title: pseudognaphalium oxyphyllum
intro: Pseudognaphalium oxyphyllum, also known as linear-leaved rabbit tobacco or narrow-leaved rabbitbrush, is a perennial shrub native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium oxyphyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a useful remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a topical treatment or tincture for various health issues.
